description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure dressed in classical armor, holding a tall spear in his right hand and a large, draped flag or banner in his left. The figure wears a helmet with a crest and a short tunic, with a cape flowing down his back. His left foot is placed on a small architectural model, possibly representing a fortress or building. The surface is painted in muted earth tones, with reds, browns, and grays dominating the palette. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular base, and the overall style suggests a historical or commemorative theme. The craftsmanship includes detailed folds in the fabric and defined musculature, giving the figure a lifelike presence.
description: A painted sculpture of a classical armored male figure holding a spear and flag, with a cape and helmet, standing on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, armor, spear, flag, and architectural model under his left foot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped flag and the depth of the cape, with the spear and helmet profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the cape and the back of the helmet, with the flag and spear extending upward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the architectural model more clearly and the figure's arm and hand positions.
attribute_subject_matter: classical armored human figure with flag and architectural model
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
